title: Publisher Buffers, Drain, Admission, and Bounded Batching · Type Forensics
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective publisher admission and buffer-pressure controller; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in publisher admission and buffer-pressure controller and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Treat amqplib publish and sendToQueue return values as writable-buffer admission signals rather than delivery confirmations or Promises.
Pause admission after false, coordinate a bounded drain waiter, handle close and abort, and avoid lost wakeups or listener leaks.
Propagate publisher capacity to HTTP or job admission with queue, byte, time, tenant, and rejection budgets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Publish Boolean Contract
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug messaging team handles case 4487 in a quorum queue during a planned rolling maintenance window. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to propagate blocked, byte capacity, publish boolean, and drain state into upstream admission; preserve one tenant fairness invariant; then close the channel while one acknowledgement decision is still pending. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Treat amqplib publish and sendToQueue return values as writable-buffer admission signals rather than delivery confirmations or Promises.

Inspect the Publish Boolean Contract trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Publish Boolean Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for treat amqplib publish and sendtoqueue return values as writable-buffer admission signals rather than delivery confirmations or promises. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Publish Boolean Contract, keep Publish Boolean Contract connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
